headline: PNC Bank’s US$2b Branch Push And What It Means For Valuation
summary: PNC Bank, part of PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC), plans a $2b expansion of its physical branch network. The multiyear program targets about 300 new branches across the United States. Key growth markets, including Charlotte, are a priority within this expansion plan. For investors watching PNC Financial Services Group at a share price of $213.05, this branch build out adds a fresh piece of information to the story. The stock is up 22.4% over the past year and 64.8% over 3 years,...
